parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template_alias: $('Validate + Compose').item.json.template_alias, to_email: $('Validate + Compose').item.json.to, postmark_message_id: ($json && $json.MessageID) || null, postmark_error_code: ($json && $json.ErrorCode) || null, sent_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message_id: ($('Postmark Send').item.json && $('Postmark Send').item.json.MessageID) || null }) }}
